commit_scope: Enable non-interactive Gemini CLI defaults, extend quota-aware model cooldown remaps, and preserve actionable retry memory so failed spec/impl/review attempts can be patched without restarting from scratch.
evidence_refs: cd api && pytest -q tests/test_openclaw_executor_integration.py tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py tests/test_agent_task_persistence.py tests/test_failure_taxonomy_service.py tests/test_agent_execution_prompt.py

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Awaiting commit/push and public deploy verification

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Retries preserve actionable failure context and model cooldown remaps exhausted models while keeping usage attribution linked to real tool and idea ids.
test_flows: Run local matrix flows with codex/claude/cursor/gemini and confirm retry memory markers in failed-task context.
Run production matrix and verify runtime events map task_id to correct tool endpoint and idea_id.
Induce model-limit failure and verify cooldown remap plus model_selection_decisions telemetry in task context.
